// Fixture for TestNoGracefulNilInRequestPaths.
//
// This file is .go.txt (not .go) so `go test` and `go build` don't compile
// it. The walker parses it from disk as raw source.
//
// LEGAL: this nil-check lives in `cmd/` (startup wiring). The walker
// must NOT flag it. Startup validation is the ONLY legal nil-check site.

package main

type fakeAuthorizer struct{}

func validateStartupDeps(authz *fakeAuthorizer) error {
	// Legal: startup validation. If a required dep is missing, the
	// binary must exit 1 — but the *check itself* is the canonical
	// nil-check pattern. The walker's allowlist permits it because
	// this file lives under cmd/.
	if authz == nil {
		return nil
	}
	return nil
}
